name: aws-mcp
description: AWS access via the AWS MCP Server, bridged through a native-binary proxy.

interface.shortDescription: AWS MCP Server access through a native proxy
interface.longDescription: Guidance for routing AWS MCP Server tools between public documentation lookups and authenticated AWS API calls. The Claude package also includes a native aws-mcp-proxy launcher; Codex MCP bootstrap needs a separate compatibility pass before this manifest declares MCP servers.
defaultPrompt: Choose the right AWS MCP server for this task.
Check whether this AWS call needs credentials.
Show the configured AWS MCP endpoint.
